nodes.name: Cron Trigger
nodes.description: Triggers every 15 minutes to fetch latest news from all RSS sources

nodes.name: Merge Feeds
nodes.description: Merges all RSS feed items into a single array

nodes.name: Filter & Classify
nodes.description: Filters news from last 2 hours with priority keywords and classifies by category/urgency

nodes.name: Deduplicate
nodes.description: Removes duplicate news items by comparing against previously seen GUIDs

nodes.name: Store Feed
nodes.description: Stores news to news_feed.json (last 100 items, rotating old)

nodes.name: Alert Webhook
nodes.description: Sends POST to webhook when high urgency news detected

nodes.name: If High Urgency
nodes.description: Branch flow only if news has high urgency flag

nodes.name: Webhook Urgent
nodes.description: GET /webhook/news-urgent - Returns today's high urgency news

nodes.name: Get Latest 20
nodes.description: Reads last 20 news from feed file for webhook

nodes.name: Get Urgent
nodes.description: Reads today's high urgency news from feed file for webhook
